name: Symphony Fourth
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Faded Legacy - Ch. 8 - Last Symphony
descriptionTemplate: If the Arithmetica Cost of the next card you play this turn is 3 or more, gain 2 Arithmetica. Otherwise, draw 2 cards. If this is the {ordinal:4th} time this Posse was unleashed this battle, instead create 4 {Insight}.
lore:
Notes gather into a surging sea of stars, the theme dances in the grand deep space.
Close your eyes and listen. Listen to the end of the universe, listen to the climax of the universe.
